melee: By hammer and hash, the Forgemaiden struck the Boss true.
Another forge-blow rang out, and the Boss reeled.
Steel met flaw; the Forgemaiden hammered on.
The anvil sang once more beneath her relentless strokes.
spell: She channelled the proving-spell, and the runes held their breath.
A cast of testing-fire wreathed the work in light.
The Forgemaiden weaved a spell of trial upon the build.
scout: She read the deep-glyphs, and the lay of the land grew plain.
A scouting-grep swept the halls; what was hidden showed itself.
The Forgemaiden peered into the archives and learned their secret.
counter: The foe struck back, and her Resolve guttered like a windblown torch.
A counter-blow landed; the kingdom's heart faltered a moment.
The Boss answered in kind, and her spirit took the wound.
summon: By hammer and hash, THUNDORR was called, and the air went taut.
She summoned the Eidolon, and a shadow of legend fell across the field.
An ally of old was bidden forth; the ground trembled at its coming.
aetherStorm: An Aether-Storm rolled in, and the channeling-spells stood becalmed.
The skies churned with wild aether; the forge held its breath till it passed.
A tempest of the outer airs swept the arena, and all casting waited.
idle: A quiet fell upon the forge.
The arena drew a slow, waiting breath.
dispel: The Forgemaiden looked closer, and the Mirage broke; the truth stood plain.
She named the illusion for what it was, and the Scribe set the record straight.
The false vision shattered under a clear eye; what was true was told anew.
shaman: The Fallen Shaman was unmasked as the root of all the haunting symptoms.
Beneath the recurring imps stood their maker; the root cause was laid bare.
She traced the curse to its source, and the Shaman of the deep was revealed.
